SERVICE UPDATE
October 2025

FULLY RESTORED & STRONGER THAN EVER

An Apology & An Update

Dear Valued Customer,

We are writing to provide a full update on the recent service interruptions, and first, we want to offer our sincerest apology. We know how frustrating it was to experience these issues, especially the billing system error that incorrectly affected access for some of you. This is not the standard of service we hold ourselves to, and we are truly sorry for the inconvenience and disruption this caused.

At I-World Networks, we remain committed to providing you with a reliable, fast, and uninterrupted internet experience.

THE RESOLUTION

Issue Resolved: Our engineering and technical teams worked around the clock to fully resolve both the billing error and the underlying technical challenges. Thanks to the swift intervention of our skilled Software Development and Network Engineering teams, the system is now fully stable and all access has been correctly restored.

Commitment to Prevention: To prevent a recurrence, we have implemented additional safeguards and enhanced our testing protocols for our upgrade and billing systems. We are investing in our processes to better serve you.

THE UPGRADE ADVANTAGE

The silver lining is that this resolution process accelerated a major, critical upgrade to our core network. This service upgrade was aimed at improving overall network stability and performance.

Key Improvement Details
Network Capacity Increased overall bandwidth capacity and efficiency by over 150%.
Your Experience This translates to a faster, more stable, and more resilient connection for you.
Current Status The network is now fully optimized across all regions.
YOUR TRUST IS ESSENTIAL

We sincerely apologize for any inconvenience you may have experienced during this period and truly appreciate your patience and understanding.

Your trust is essential to us. We are more committed than ever to being your reliable partner for connectivity.

Sincerely,

The Team at I-World Networks
